song.title: This Is My Desire
song.presentation: V1 V2 C V1 V2 C E
song.lyrics:
[V1] . G Em C Am D 1) This is my desire, to honor You, .G Em Lord with all my heart, . F D I worship You, [V2] . G Em C Am D 2) All I have within me, I give You praise, .G Em F D All that I adore, is in You.
[C] Chorus .G D Lord I give You my heart, . Em I give You my soul, . C D G I live for You alone, . D Every breath that I take, . Em Every moment I'm awake, . C D G Lord, have Your way in me.
[E] 1) This is my desire, to honor You, Lord with all my heart, I worship You, All I have within me, I give You praise, All that I adore, is in You. Chorus Lord I give You my heart, I give You my soul, I live for You alone, Every breath that I take, Every moment I'm awake, Lord, have Your way in me.
